# Read Project Prompt

Read the Store Audit Trainer documentation:

1. docs/app-bible.md
2. docs/engineering.md
3. docs/implementation-phases.md
4. docs/implementation-checklist.md
5. docs/ui-ux-design-system.md

Then summarize:

- Product goal
- Current technical architecture
- User roles
- UI/UX direction
- Implementation phase order
- Non-negotiable rules
- Security constraints
- Data model overview
- AI/reporting rules
- Next recommended phase or subphase

Do not write code.

If any document is missing or still contains placeholder text, report that clearly and ask the user to add the real document before implementing business logic.
